app.title: Snack & Catch
app.tagline: For every Cobblemon Pokémon: which Poké Snack to cook to attract it, where it spawns, under what conditions.

pokedex.title: Cobblemon Pokédex
pokedex.intro: All species indexed by the mod and its addons, with their real stats. Filter by type or generation, scroll to load more.

cake.title: Poké Snack maker
cake.intro: Drop a bait seasoning into a slot. Depending on the seasoning, the Snack biases attraction by type, egg group, nature or IVs; some boost shiny odds, hidden ability or rarity bucket. Place the Snack on the ground to draw Pokémon within 8 blocks.

about.title: About
about.intro: Snack & Catch references data published by the Cobblemon mod and popular community addons. Every displayed value is linked to its source.
about.apiIntro: Read-only JSON endpoint, 60s cache, rate limit 60 req/min/IP.
about.pokemonNotice: Pokémon and creature names are trademarks of Nintendo / Game Freak / The Pokémon Company. This project is unofficial and not affiliated.

recipes.title: Cooking recipes
recipes.intro: Cobblemon Campfire Pot recipes: cake, bait, snack, aprijuice. Seasoning slots personalize the resulting effects.

kindsHelp.cake: Shared cake that biases encounters (color depends on seasoning).
kindsHelp.bait: Fishing bait — tweaks rarity / nature / HA according to the seasoning used.
kindsHelp.snack: Snack that attracts a Pokémon by flavor type.
kindsHelp.aprijuice: Apricorn berry juice to boost mount stats.

pokemon.cakeHelp: Bait seasonings that bias encounters toward this Pokémon via its type ({flavour}). Place one in a Snack slot.
pokemon.baitsHelp: Documented bait effects (bite time, shiny reroll, HA, type bias).
pokemon.noSpawn: No natural spawn documented for this species.

juice.title: Aprijuice maker
juice.intro: Brew an aprijuice in the Campfire Pot. The apricorn colour provides a baked-in set of ride stat deltas; berries added as seasoning contribute flavour points that convert into extra boosts via the threshold table (15 → 1pt, 35 → 2pt, 45 → 3pt, 55 → 4pt, 75 → 5pt, 105 → 6pt).
juice.targetHelp: Click a stat to add it to your priority list. Use the arrows to reorder — rank 1 weighs the most, rank 5 the least. Unranked stats are ignored by the solver.
juice.distributeHelp: Split your budget across the 5 ride stats. Each slider is capped at what your owned berries + apricorns can actually produce. The solver finds the closest achievable recipe.
juice.ownershipTitle: Tell us what's in your inventory
juice.ownershipHelp: Everything is checked by default. Uncheck apricorns and berries you don't own so the solver only proposes recipes you can actually craft.
juice.distanceTitle: Distance to your target (lower is closer)
juice.recipeIntro: Step-by-step to craft this aprijuice in Minecraft. Drop the 3 fixed ingredients in the top row of the Cooking Pot, then add your berries as seasonings on the side slots.
juice.howtoStep1: Stand next to a lit Cooking Pot (craft it with 8 sticks + 1 iron ingot).
juice.howtoStep2: Place a {apricorn} Apricorn in the top-left slot.
juice.howtoStep3: Add one Pep-Up Flower (middle top) and one Energy Root (top right).
juice.howtoStep4: Drop these berries on the side seasoning slots:
juice.howtoStep4NoSeasoning: Leave the side seasoning slots empty — this recipe uses no berries.
juice.howtoStep5: Right-click the pot with a Glass Bottle to collect the finished aprijuice.
juice.pickStat: Pick at least one stat above.
juice.noCombo: No combination scores positive. Try fewer stats.
juice.rideBoostsHelp: Result = flavour points (converted from totals) + apricorn baseline. Held by a rideable Pokémon, these boost its ride controller stats.
juice.noNetBoost: No net boost. Add more berries to cross the next threshold.

snack.effectsHelp: Cumulated effects from every seasoning in the pot. Merged per (type, subcategory) following SpawnBaitUtils.mergeEffects: chances sum and cap at 100%, values are ceil-summed.
snack.dropSeasoning: Drop a bait seasoning to see its effects.
snack.attractedWip: Work in progress — probabilities are approximate
snack.attractedWipBody: The ranking below is my best-effort reproduction of the Cobblemon Poké Snack spawn pipeline (world pool filtered by biome/time/Y, uncommon ×2.25 / rare & ultra-rare ×5.5 bucket multipliers applied unconditionally, typing/egg-group bait effects multiplying matching entries' weight, then rarity_bucket softening inter-bucket ratios — probability ≈ P(bucket) × weight share). It is not yet 1:1 with the mod. Edge cases around anticonditions, nested conditions, structure/lunar/skylight gates and addon-specific spawn rules are still being ironed out, so treat the numbers as a guide, not a guarantee. Improvements land continuously.
snack.noAttracted: No Pokémon match. Try removing filters.
snack.previewDisclaimer: Preview only — the in-game snack may look different.
